allow: PowerShell(try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5174/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5\).StatusCode } catch { "5174 응답없음" }; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5\).StatusCode } catch { "5173 응답없음" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{ Port=$_.LocalPort; PID=$_.OwningProcess; Name=$p.Name; Path=$p.Path } } | Format-List } else { "5173 LISTEN 없음" })
